articles.title: Russia was behind arson attacks targeting PM, BBC reveals
articles.description: Evidence shows Russians directing the plot and stoking tensions with fake far-right and Muslim groups.

articles.title: Trump says deal to end war with Iran already signed and details to be released 'pretty soon'
articles.description: Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be open from Friday but there is still confusion about the exact contents of the agreement.
